text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first G1 race of the Tiara tour is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a once-in-a-lifetime experience, and Daiwa
Scarlet is probably the most exhausted she's ever
been.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That being the case, I decide to give her the day
off. Or... that was the plan, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Check it out! Scarlet and Vodka are going at it
again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Vodka, you can do it! Scarlet, give it your
all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You have got to be kidding me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I won! That makes eight out of thirteen!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All righty. Time to head back. No point in wearin'
myself out here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Come back here! You can't just leave while
you're ahead!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph! I'm not even that tired. Honestly, I'm
fine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was just doing some solo training this morning
when she asked me to run with her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, crud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk her back to her dorm to make sure she
doesn't do any more training in secret.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. You're acting like a real helicopter parent,
you know?! I don't need to be babysat...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're really planning on going for it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Please... Give me some advice.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. I never thought I'd see Vodka bow like
that to anyone, let alone to Brian.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's getting advice from a veteran, huh. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Fine! You've made your point!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Air Groove is back yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet speeds off toward her dorm with
suspicious enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, everyone's abuzz with shocking
news about the Japanese Oaks, the second race
of the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka isn't entering the Japanese Oaks? She's
running in the Derby instead?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way! She's dropping out of the Tiara tour? What happened to beating me?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it. She's actually running from our
contest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All that talk about being cool, and she just ups
and changes her tour, just like that! That's so far
from cool...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good grief... All that energy I built up... All for
nothing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh... I guess I must have collapsed back there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. You've been sneaking out of the dorm
to train again, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You should thank your lucky stars that there were
people around. Can you imagine if you had
collapsed all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right. I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And as for you, Trainer... You must keep a cool
head at all times. Panicking like you did back
there won't help Scarlet any.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Her future in your hands—and you'd do best to
remember that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me, I've taken the liberty of
calling your roommate to collect you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My roommate? You can't mean...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What'd you go and faint for? You're not setting a
very good standard, Miss Model Student.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Quiet, you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Besides, you're the one being lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You gave up on the Tiara tour, right? You figured
you couldn't get first place with me in the
running.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'll just say it. You quit halfway through,
like a coward!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Like hell I did!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm running the Derby to break through to a
whole 'nother level of cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm no coward! You just don't have a clue!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Besides, that's pretty rich coming from you! Aren't
you the one who keeps going on about being
number one without even knowing what that
means?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ex-cuse me?! What's that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You tell me! What does being number
one even look like?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Is it just taking first place? Then you should just
run in races you know you can win, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't make me laugh! That's not what being
number one means at all!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Then what does it mean? Do you even know?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I... That's...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: See. You don't even have an answer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Your "number one" is meaningless... Just empty
words.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You're wrong.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're wrong! My dream is nothing like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, Daiwa Scarlet can't find the words
to refute Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biting her lip, she ponders what it means to be
"number one."
